stemHtml: You are cruising under IFR in uncontrolled airspace at 2600 ft. Is this allowed?

options.a: No, he/she should fly at FL20 or FL30.
options.b: No, under 3000 ft IFR is not allowed.
options.c: Yes, if the competent authority uses flight levels from 3000ft and above.
options.d: Yes, provided that the transition altitude is lower than 3000 ft.
